name: cf-migrate-monorepo
description: Codefresh → GitHub Actions intelligent migration system (VSCode extension wrapping GitHub Copilot)

scripts.build: tsc -b packages/core packages/kb packages/llm packages/agents packages/extension
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b --noEmit packages/core packages/kb packages/llm packages/agents packages/extension
scripts.watch: tsc -b --watch packages/core packages/kb packages/llm packages/agents packages/extension
